title: PPIP - Share Data toggle can be changed to ON or OFF while on Guest account
scenario: Share Data toggle in App Settings > General > Account is functional and reflects user choice from PPIP onboarding dialogue on Guest account
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. If not already on the Home screen, navigate to the Home screen.
3. Tap the Account icon or navigate to App Settings (gear icon) → General → Account.
5. If currently ON, tap to toggle it OFF. If currently OFF, tap to toggle it ON.
6. Observe whether the toggle changes state and whether any confirmation or error dialog appears.
expected: The 'Share Data' toggle should be functional and change state (ON/OFF) when tapped. If the user is using a Guest account, the toggle should still be interactive and reflect the user's choice. The PPIP (Privacy/Data Sharing) dialogue shown during onboarding with options 'Don't Share' and 'Share Data' should be respected, and the toggle in settings should reflect that choice.
